hooks.command: if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS='--idempotent'; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --auto-record"; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS='--idempotent'; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --auto-record"; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi
if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$SAGEOX_AGENT_ID" ]; then ox agent "$SAGEOX_AGENT_ID" session stop 2>&1 || true; fi
